steps.title: Interpret the annual growth as a multiplicative factor
steps.content: Each year, Luis has 1.1% more money than the previous year. This means his account balance is multiplied by $1 + 0.011 = 1.011$ each year.

steps.title: Recognize the exponential form
steps.content: When a quantity is multiplied by a constant factor each time period, the model is exponential. After $t$ years: $$A(t) = 150 \times (1.011)^t$$ This is not linear (which would add a constant amount each year); it multiplies by a constant, which defines exponential growth.

steps.title: Determine if increasing or decreasing
steps.content: The base of the exponential is $1.011 > 1$. When the base exceeds 1, the exponential function increases over time. The amount of money grows larger each year. This is increasing exponential growth — that matches choice C — C is correct.
